project_context.name: AI Task Flow
project_context.description: A generic task flow workspace for collecting requirements, structuring tasks, handing them to AI, and backfilling execution results.

structured_task_schema.description: A task record should preserve intent, scope, constraints, acceptance checks, tracking metadata, and implementation runs.

ai_handoff_loop.description: Rough idea -> structured task -> prompt -> AI implementation -> structured result backfill.
